title: Julia Project.toml
description: Schema for Julia package and environment Project.toml files. See https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/toml-files/ and https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/compatibility/.

name.description: Package or environment name. Registered packages should use a valid Julia package identifier.

uuid.description: Package UUID assigned by Pkg.generate or the General registry tooling.

version.description: Package version. Registered Julia packages should use semantic versioning.

deps.description: Runtime dependencies. Keys are package names; values are package UUIDs.

weakdeps.description: Optional dependencies used by package extensions.

extensions.description: Extension modules and the weak dependency or dependencies that trigger them.

compat.description: Compatibility bounds for deps, weakdeps, extras, and Julia itself. See Julia Pkg compatibility docs.

extras.description: Extra packages used by targets such as tests.

targets.description: Named target dependency sets, commonly test = ["Test"].

sources.description: Pkg source overrides for unregistered or path-based dependencies.

workspace.description: Julia workspace settings for multi-project repositories.

docs.main: Julia Project.toml schema for vSmartMOM. Main references: [Pkg TOML files](https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/toml-files/) and [compatibility bounds](https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/compatibility/).
